auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your ID number or email and your personal password.

auth.errorInactive: Account is inactive — contact your manager

auth.changePasswordHelp: Please enter your current password and a new password.
auth.needHelp: Forgot password? Contact admin to reset.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

errors.passwordFieldsRequired: Enter and confirm your new password
errors.mustChangeBeforeContinue: You must change your password before continuing
errors.passwordSameAsBefore: New password must be different from the previous one
errors.sessionRefreshFailed: Password updated but session refresh failed — please sign in again

auth.forceChangeSubtitle: Please set a new password before you start working

permissions.title: Permissions (screens)
permissions.superAdminAll: SUPER ADMIN can see the entire system.

dashboard.heroSubtitle: Income, expenses, profit and balances — at a glance.
dashboard.kpiNoDepositTrend: Zero deposit and not marked paid
dashboard.shortageOk: No shortages in the last count
dashboard.dbUnavailableHint: Dashboard shows empty data. Ensure your Supabase project is active (not paused), DATABASE_URL is correct, and try DATABASE_USE_DIRECT=true if the pooler (port 6543) fails.

redesign.title: Business dashboard
redesign.subtitle: Revenue, expenses, Z reports, weddings, and alerts at a glance.
redesign.heroSubtitle: Revenue, expenses and cash flow — at a glance

financePortal.title: Income, expenses, and cashflow oversight.
financePortal.subtitle: The finance workspace starts with source-linked documents and ledger entries so every cash movement can be traced to an invoice, Z-report, purchase order, or approved adjustment.

ledgers.title: Unified ledger
ledgers.subtitle: By default all customers, suppliers and employees are shown together. Use the "Filter" button to apply filters.
ledgers.entityPickPrompt: Pick an entity type to filter by name
ledgers.openingHelp: Updates the system's opening balance field (separate from document debts).
ledgers.typeAndRange: Type: {{type}} · date range per active filters

checks.title: Check management
checks.subtitle: Full tracking: statuses, clearance, bounces, automatic alerts.
checks.backfillHint: Scans income documents and adds any check rows that were missed

scan.title: Scan invoice or receipt
scan.dropTitle: Drop a file here or click to upload
scan.dropSubtitle: We'll OCR the document, detect supplier and items, and prefill the expense form for you
scan.acceptedFormats: JPG, PNG, WEBP, PDF — up to 12MB
scan.scanningSubtitle: Detecting text, parsing totals and comparing to regular prices
scan.previewHint: Upload a document to begin. Detected fields will appear here for review before saving.
scan.errorNotConfigured: OCR is not configured on the server. You can still fill the form manually.
scan.errorPartial: Couldn't read the whole document. Please review the parsed data and continue.
scan.errorEmpty: Couldn't extract any data from the file — try again or enter manually.
scan.errorReadFailed:
We couldn't read the document.
Try a clearer photo or a PDF with a text layer.
scan.errorTryClearerImage: Try a clearer photo or a straight-on shot of the invoice
scan.errorFileTooLarge: File is too large for OCR (OCR.space free tier is about 1MB)
scan.errorOcrTemporary: Temporary OCR server issue — please try again in a minute
scan.errorOcrProvider: OCR provider error — check API key or try again
scan.suggestNewSupplier: Supplier «{{name}}» wasn't found — you can create a new supplier after saving.
scan.ocrFromCache: Loaded from cache — this file was scanned before
scan.ocrDebugEngWarning: Warning: OCR ran in English — Hebrew may be garbled. Clear cache and rescan.
scan.ocrDebugManualReview: Manual review required — low OCR quality
scan.totalSuspectWarning: Invoice total does not match line items — verify before saving
scan.pdfMultiPageWarning: PDF has {{count}} pages — only page 1 is scanned
scan.partialHint: Some fields were detected — you can edit and continue manually
scan.uncertainLine: This line may be incorrect — review before saving
scan.suspectAmount: Unusual amount — likely not a product
scan.supplierNotFoundHint: Detected: «{{name}}» — add new or link to existing
scan.matchSupplierModalHint: Is «{{name}}» the same as one of these?
scan.skippedLinesHint: {{count}} document lines were not treated as items (header / invoice details)

procurement.noProducts: No products yet. Add the first one.

recipes.pageSubtitle: Prep workflows, steps and work times
recipes.selectRecipe: Pick a recipe from the list
recipes.toastOnTime: Great job — step finished on time

register.title: Finance register
register.subtitle: Documents, payments and expenses in one unified form.
register.heading: Documents & records management
register.intro: Document entries are stored as records in the system; payment breakdown in the Z report and line items with VAT.
register.editBanner: Editing a saved document — publishing will update the record in the database.

procurement.title: Supplier price list
procurement.hint: Pick a supplier — a product catalog panel opens for price comparison and line fill.
procurement.emptyProducts: No products in this supplier catalog
procurement.pickLineHint: Click an item name field in a line to fill from the catalog

validations.itemsRequired: At least one line is required
validations.paymentExceedsTotal: Sum of payment methods cannot exceed the document total.
validations.paymentAmountPositive: Please enter a positive payment amount.
validations.paymentNeedsCustomer: Cannot record a payment without a customer linked to the document.
validations.paymentExceedsRemaining: Payment amount cannot exceed the open balance.

modal.docSavedToCashflow: The document was saved and added to the cash flow.
modal.editConflict: An edit is active for another document — switch to the matching tab or cancel the edit.
modal.paymentSavedDescription: Payment recorded and updated in the cash flow and ledger.
modal.paymentSavedDocDescription: Payment recorded and updated in the document, cash flow and ledger.

errors.docSavedPdfFailed: Document saved, but PDF generation failed.
errors.paymentSavedPdfFailed: Payment recorded, but PDF generation failed.

check.autoCreateHint: The check will be saved automatically in the checks table with alerts before due date, on due day, and when late.
check.missingFields: When paying by check, the check number, bank and due date are required.

zreport.title: Z report (POS)
zreport.intro: Detailed daily payment summaries; total amount is calculated automatically.

income.intro: Record invoices and commercial documents; for event clients, deposit and tray fields are shown.

expense.intro: Record expenses by payment category — suppliers, daily, workers, external, and investments.
expense.heading: Expense registration

archive.title: Document archive
archive.subtitle: Browse, search and export PDF of bookkeeping documents.
archive.filterSearchPlaceholder: Document number, name, or free text…
archive.intro: Every PDF generated from income, expenses, Z-reports and cashflow is saved in Storage and listed here. Deleting a finance document does not remove its PDF from the archive.
archive.trackingDesc: Mark documents as sent to the accountant, filter by status, and perform bulk actions. History is saved in the log.
archive.emptyNotSent: Well done — no documents are waiting to be sent to the accountant.
archive.emptySent: No documents marked as sent to the accountant.
archive.noLogs: No transfer records yet for this document.
archive.deleteDocWarn: The file will be removed from Storage and the record from the archive. This action does not restore a deleted source document.

toasts.markedSent: Marked as sent to the accountant.
toasts.bulkMarked: Marked {{count}} documents as sent to the accountant.

cashflow.title: Cash flow
cashflow.subtitle: Unified view of in/out and cash balance.
cashflow.openingHelp: Opening balance is the starting point for the period's flow.
cashflow.journalSubtitle: Records cashflow table entries only; no customer balances or open debts — those appear in ledgers and collections screens.
cashflow.noExpenseTypeEntries: No movements for this expense type.
cashflow.confirmDelete: Delete this entry from the journal?
cashflow.fillDateAmount: Please enter a date and a positive amount.

zReport.confirmDeleteDocument: Delete this Z report and all related journal entries?

incomePage.title: Create Income Document
incomePage.subtitle: Boilerplate invoice capture form. On save, the invoice document becomes the origin record for any future cashflow or ledger rows.

incomePage.noIncomeDocsYet: No income documents in database yet.

users.title: Users & employees
users.subtitle: Create and edit users, set permissions per screen. An employee sees only what is checked.

fields.passwordResetHint: (reset — fill to create a new password)
